title: Fire Emblem; Seisen no Keifu Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Fire Emblem; Seisen no Keifu (1996) is a acclaimed tactics rpg title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Position units on a grid, exploit weapon triangles, and survive permadeath stakes.
